name: IMDb
description: The world's most authoritative source for movie, TV, and celebrity info. Ratings, trailers, cast lists, and box office data for millions of titles.

name: Letterboxd
description: Social film diary and review platform. Log every movie you watch, write reviews, make lists, and follow friends' tastes.

name: JustWatch
description: Streaming guide that tells you exactly where to watch any movie or show — Netflix, Prime, Disney+, and more — all in one search.

name: Rotten Tomatoes
description: Aggregated critic and audience scores for movies and TV. The Tomatometer is the industry-standard freshness rating.

name: Metacritic
description: Weighted Metascore aggregator for movies, TV, games, and music. Combines top critic reviews into a single authoritative score.

name: Trakt
description: Automatically track every movie and TV episode you watch. Syncs with Plex, Kodi, and Emby. Great for stats and recommendations.

name: FilmFreeway
description: The leading platform for film festival submissions worldwide. Browse thousands of festivals and submit your short or feature film.

name: The Movie DB
description: Community-built movie and TV database. Free API access for developers, extensive metadata, and beautiful poster artwork collections.
